value.0: An indecipherable message is scrawled on the tombside in fresh blood. You wonder what undead lord calls this sarcophagus his home.
Metals studs poke through the woodwork of this ornate chest. Judging by the fine craftsmanship, this strongbox appears to have been intended for public display.
Metals studs poke through the woodwork of this ornate chest. Judging by the fine craftsmanship, this strongbox appears to have been intended for public display.
Strange runes and pictographs, likely arcane in nature, have been scorched into the sides of this hide-covered strongbox.
The stone lid is heavy, designed as much to keep thieves out as to keep the dead entombed within.
A carefully constructed marker denoting a point of interest.
Here lies the Tomb of Garmir and wife Jelenwey. May he sword finally be put to rest.

Garmir's Son... Taramir, to soon did he leave us. He will be missed.
